title: [Fineapple] APRIL討論區 (3) 妹妹團2019年要走花路！比大發更大發！！

replies.msg:
APRIL（韓語：에이프릴）是韓國DSP Media於2015年推出的女子組合。



團名由來：四月（APRIL）是有着嶄新氛圍的一個月份，包含着美好及溫暖的意思。「APRIL」還有另外一層意義，就是最好的「A」，加上代表可愛女性的「PRIL」組合而成。因此含意為「帶給大眾美好和溫暖的歌曲而讓人深深喜愛的少女們」。

初始成員有六人，包括昭敏、彩媛、玹珠、娜恩、睿娜、珍率。2015年8月24日推出首張迷你專輯《Dreaming》。8月25日於SBS MTV音樂節目《THE SHOW》以《꿈사탕》（Dream Candy）一曲正式出道。



2015年11月9日，DSP Media發表聲明，隊長昭敏因要專心學業而退隊。APRIL變成五人組合。



2016年10月29日，DSP Media宣佈，玹珠決定離開APRIL，改為以演員身份繼續個人活動。而DSP Media會物色新成員加入團隊。



2016年11月11日，DSP Media表示，彩暻將正式加入APRIL，並與其他成員積極籌備回歸。

2016年11月24日，新成員Rachel加入APRIL。APRIL再次成為六人組合。現時並無成員擔任隊長。



官方歌迷名稱：파인에플（Fineapple）
「Fine」是「美好」的意思，「Apple」是APRIL讀音的縮寫，組合起來就是「美好的APRIL」。因為Fineapple讀音與Pineapple很相似，所以亦會以菠蘿圖案作為代表。

replies.msg: 老漢推po

I was looking for a letter and got sidetracked browsing this forum. Yesterday I assigned six hours for practicing their songs on my cor anglais, clarinet, E-flat clarinet and bass clarinet. If you want the music to be more rhythmic you can add sleigh bells (jingle bells), tambourine, castanets, triangle, cymbals (hi-hat, clash, ride.etc.) and gongs. I remember seeing them live at Saitama Super Arena which was marvelous. They've been strutting their stuff since they were kids so don't sell them short. At the end of the last encore they bowed onstage soaking up the applause. They were given a thunderous standing ovation. On top of being an incredible musician, the lead singer is also an avid runner. She took part in a three thousand metre race where she came first. She rose to the challenge of passing the runners who were ahead of her, ran for all she was worth and dived over the finish line. Loads of fans congratulated her for having won the race as she held the trophy up. The race was the opportunity for all the worlds best runners to strut their stuff. It was truly memorable. I remember dining at a nearby ramen restaurant after the concert. The table was sticky maybe because the staff forgot to wipe it up so I asked them to wipe it up. Later I spilled a bowl of miso soul all over the table and the floor so I ended up wiping the spiky soup up. I had a friendly chat with a lady who was sitting at a nearby table who told mr in centuries past a whole village was wiped out by a catastrophic earthquake. Fascinating. When I finished my meal I wiped my mouth on my sleeve lol and a piece of tissue. There's an elegant cafe of which the interior and the exterior are artistically and exquisitely designed. The other week my friend spilt his cappuccino all over his work as well as down his tie on his shirt so he had to wipe up this mess. I enjoy drinking coffee and chatting with the baristas there so much that I sometimes make it worth their while.

2020.04.25 Makestar APRIL 7th Mini Album Video Call Event <Calling in APRIL> 包膠

話說小弟參加咗 Makestar 嘅新碟銷售活動。有 30 個幸運兒可以得到 APRIL 親筆簽名碟之外，仲可以同 APRIL 六位成員進行單對單 video call。

小弟萬幸，星期四收到 email 通知話抽中咗。我初頭估個活動可能放到好後期至舉行，但係原來個 video call 響星期六就做。仲要我被安排咗第一個做 video call。嚇到我個心當堂離一離。

我用咗一晚時間諗 d 問題，又做咗好多測試、rehearsal，務求令到個 video call 可以好順利咁進行。最後，到咗星期六，終於見到六位寶貝啦，好滾動！

雖然接觸咗 K-pop 好耐，concert 又去過好幾次，但係韓國簽名會黎講，我從來無去過。其實要買碟抽籤去簽名會，呢 d 功夫好難遙距做。響武肺影響下，咁就做就咗一個虛擬嘅 fan sign event 出黎。呢 d 虛擬 fan sign 唔只有一次，陸陸續續都會繼續搞。呢次對地皮 / APRIL 黎講，係佢地嘅第一次，亦係我嘅第一次。

為咗紀念「破處」，我決定寫返個包膠，逐字打返個過程出黎。希望各位菠蘿可以回味一下。(同埋有機會的話可以做好 d，唔好學我咁手忙腳亂。)

事不宜遲，包膠開始：

(個 video call 係用手機進行，我同每個成員只有一分鐘嘅時間傾計，點樣響「黃金一分鐘」入面令到 APRIL 對我留下深刻印像呢？呢個真係難題黎... )
